function X(X)return y[X-(-955029-(-1018915))]end for X,w in ipairs({{992679-992678;1006446-1005949};{-913887-(-913888);481695-481590},{760204-760098,-457880-(-458377)}})do while w[-310677+310678]<w[-431250+431252]do local X=y local w=table.concat local r=string.char local V=string.len local N=string.sub local J=table.insert local S=type local return(function(y,r,V,N,J,S,d,b,p,g,I,c,w,o,L,n,U,x,A,f,Z,Y)b,U,A,f,c,p,L,x,n,g,o,I,Y,Z,w=function(y,X)local r=g(X)local V=function(V,N,J,S)return w(y,{V,N,J,S},X,r)end return V end,function(y,X)local
